title: Citrusy Tender Thai Apricot Stir-fry
description: A citrusy and tender weeknight dish featuring apricot jam, blanched in a dairy-free-friendly stir-fry that's perfect for quick weekday meals.
instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add apricot jam and water to the pan, bring to a simmer.
Add garlic and green onions to the jam mixture, cooking until fragrant and slightly softened.
Blanch bell peppers and carrots by dropping them into boiling salted water for 1 minute. Drain well and set aside.
In the same skillet, add sliced bell peppers and carrots. Stir-fry for about 3-4 minutes or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
Mix in the cooked blanched vegetables with the apricot-jam sauce mixture. Cook for another 2 minutes to combine flavors.
If desired, glaze the dish by adding soy sauce and letting it simmer gently for a minute to reduce slightly.
